hero.title: Turning Ideas into Code
hero.description: Your next big idea deserves commitment and dedication. Hi, I'm Claudia, a career-transition developer focused on building solutions through responsibility, data analysis, and storytelling.

sobre.title: About me
sobre.paragraph1: I was born in Rio Grande do Sul and chose Florianópolis as my home when I was accepted into the Federal University of Santa Catarina (UFSC) in 2001, where I earned a degree in Physical Education (Teaching Licensure). I taught in a couple of public schools, where I quickly realized that the educational system did not always allow me to teach in the way I believed was most effective. This led me to combine my teaching background with my English skills, and I spent several years working as an English instructor.
sobre.paragraph2: As my passion for gastronomy grew, I pursued a technical degree in Culinary School at IFSC. After completing internships in restaurants, I began working independently in the field. Over time, however, I found that working in gastronomy had become physically too demanding.
sobre.paragraph3: At that point, I decided to transition into a profession that would be more sustainable in the long term. Reflecting on my soft skills and educational background, I researched career paths that aligned with my strengths and professional goals. Through conversations and research, I discovered that many paths were leading toward Information Technology.
sobre.paragraph4: After deciding to transition into technology, I realized that this journey involves much more than learning how to code. It requires resilience, continuous learning, problem-solving, and navigating real-world challenges — with plenty of debugging along the way. I am currently pursuing a Technical Degree in Systems Development at SENAI.
sobre.paragraph5: I am committed to continuously improving my skills and applying my knowledge in practical projects while exploring the many possibilities within the technology field. I am proud to say that this website was fully designed and developed by me, as well as the projects that follow. I hope you enjoy exploring my projects, and I look forward to connecting with you.
sobre.paragraph6: I am seeking opportunities to contribute to meaningful solutions and grow as part of a collaborative team, always with dedication and responsibility.

items.descricao: Marketing Report developed for a fictional company, using Power BI to transform raw data into Marketing insights. The focus is on creating performance KPIs and data storytelling to support decision-making.
Dashboard with an overview of some logistics KPIs, allowing monitoring by carrier.
Multi-page dashboard developed for the Commercial area. It presents a detailed analysis of sales from fictional stores.
Single-page report showing a summary of sales from fictional companies around the world, with some KPIs and charts.
An interactive game to test reasoning and logic, developed with JavaScript, HTML, CSS and Flask, hosted on Render.
Currently, I'm focused on web development with JavaScript, HTML, CSS and exploring back-end with Flask and Node.js.
Contributing with visual improvements and responsiveness adjustments, replacing AI images with real photos. My first hands-on experience collaborating with a tech community.
Developed during Alura's data immersion, this web application features dynamic charts and interactive filters, making data analysis and visualization accessible and intuitive.
I created a personal blog to explore and learn how to use the platform. The server is simple and greatly affects performance, but the project was essential to understand WordPress structure.

evolucao.frase_destaque: “I replaced the fear of change with the desire to grow.”

items.skills: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, React Native, Tailwind.
Git, GitHub, npm, Render, PostgreSQL, Supabase.

items.description: Living and working in the USA and Italy has prepared me to quickly and effectively adapt to new environments and challenges .
As a Chef, I learned to solve problems under pressure,  maintaining efficiency and strong attention to detail.
My experience as an English teacher taught me how to convey complex ideas in a clear and simple way, an essential skill for teamwork.
My background in gastronomy and exposure to different cultures have given me a unique perspective to think outside the box and develop innovative solutions.

evolucao.chamada: If you'd like to learn more or have an opportunity that matches my profile:

surpresas.frase1: You are stronger than you think and more amazing than you believe.
surpresas.frase2: Take a deep breath. Everything will work out.
surpresas.frase3: You deserve this moment of peace.
surpresas.frase4: The secret of life is not having what you want, but loving what you have.
surpresas.frase5: Kindness is the language that the deaf can hear and the blind can see.
surpresas.frase6: The world needs your light. Don't be afraid to shine.
surpresas.frase7: Be the kind of person your dog thinks you are: happy, brave, and always holding a treat.
surpresas.frase8: Remember: even the heaviest clouds have their dark mode activated.
surpresas.frase9: There's no elevator to success. You have to take the stairs, but you can play an upbeat song while climbing.
surpresas.frase10: Take a deep breath. If it doesn't solve everything, at least it oxygenates the brain.
surpresas.frase11: Nothing like a 404 error in life to remind you that not everything needs to be found right now.

footer.direitos: Let's make the world a better place. 💖

precisandoRelaxar.titulo_video: Press Play. For 15 seconds, the world can wait. 💕
